Szoboszlai is close to join RB Leipzig, confirmed! Three clubs contacted Salzburg to sign him - Arsenal and AC Milan included. Leipzig are leading the race and trying to complete the agreement on next week.

Final decision + announcement before Christmas, as per @Sky_MaxB. 🔴🇭🇺
https://twitter.com/fabrizioromano/status/1337404839274434561?s=21

RB Leipzig want to pay €25m release clause before Christmas to sign Szoboszlai.

Dominik will focus on league match this weekend then he’ll announce the decision - Leipzig are expected to win the race over Arsenal and AC Milan.
